{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Kotai
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Kotai]] is one of the three major clans.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kotai]] is a gray-skinned [[Underlord]] with a stone gauntlet for a hand.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16">''Underlord'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
